headline: Planned Jack Henry Chair Handover And What It Means For Investors
summary: Jack Henry & Associates (NasdaqGS:JKHY) has announced that Board Chair David Foss plans to retire effective July 15, 2026. The company expects board member Matt Flanigan to succeed Foss as Board Chair following his retirement. This transition marks the planned end of Foss's tenure in a key leadership role that has influenced the company’s direction. Jack Henry & Associates focuses on technology and payment solutions for banks and credit unions, a part of the market where reliability,...
